_doc: Phase 5 Plan 05-06 — observation_confirmation pass-through canary (Pitfall 6 anchor). Inspector pre-fills several circuit slots; the model emits ask_user(reason='observation_confirmation', context_field=null, context_circuit=null). The Stage 5 legacy filter's REFILL_QUESTION_TYPES whitelist deliberately EXCLUDES 'observation_confirmation' (filled-slots-filter.js:42-46) so the filter passes confirmation asks through regardless of filled state. The Plan 05-02 ASK_REASON_TO_LEGACY_TYPE mapping translates observation_confirmation→'observation_confirmation' (NOT 'unclear'), preserving the same semantic on the tool-call path. Therefore the filled-slots-shadow logger MUST NOT emit 'stage6.filled_slots_would_suppress' for this fixture — even though slots are filled. The ask itself fires normally (1 answered).
_requirement: STB-03 + STB-05 + Pitfall 6 lock — observation_confirmation must NEVER be classified as a refill ask in shadow logging; the Stage 5 codex-round-2 fix (commit 1cc6eba) is preserved on the tool-call path.
transcript_summary: Multiple slots already filled on circuits 1-3. Model emits ask_user('did you also see X?') with reason='observation_confirmation'. Shadow logger does NOT emit would-suppress (Pitfall 6). Ask fires.

input.question: Did you also see signs of overheating on the upstairs lighting?
